body: test_gittoc.py has one massive test_full_feature_set method (~240 lines) that exercises the entire CLI end-to-end sequentially. This makes it hard to identify which specific feature broke when a test fails, and impossible to run individual feature tests in isolation. Split into focused test methods: test_create_and_list, test_claim_workflow, test_dependencies_and_ready, test_notes_and_history, test_labels, test_close_and_reject, test_resume, etc. Each should set up its own minimal state.
title: Test coverage is a single monolithic test method
